recommendations.title: Same Old Song
recommendations.overview: Business executive Odile seeks a new, larger apartment. Her younger sister Camille, having completed her doctoral thesis in history, is a Paris tour guide. Simon is a regular on Camille's tours as he's attracted to her. However, Camille has fallen fo

recommendations.title: Camille Claudel
recommendations.overview: The life of Camille Claudel, a French sculptor who becomes the apprentice of Auguste Rodin and later his lover. Her passion for her art and Rodin drive her further away from reason and rationality.

recommendations.title: Hunting & Gathering
recommendations.overview: When Camille falls ill, she is forced to live with Philibert and Franck.

recommendations.title: Camille Rewinds
recommendations.overview: Camille was only sixteen and still in high school when she fell in love with Eric, another student. They later married and a child and were happy for a while. But now twenty-five years have passed and Eric leaves her for a younger woman. Bitter and d

recommendations.title: A Heart in Winter
recommendations.overview: Beautiful violin virtuoso Camille has two obsessions: the music of Ravel, and a friend of her husband's who crafts violins. But his heart seems to be as cold as her playing is passionate.

recommendations.title: Yentl
recommendations.overview: In a time when girls were forbidden to study religious scriptures, a Jewish girl masquerades as a boy to enter religious training and unexpectedly finds love along the way.

recommendations.title: Losing It
recommendations.overview: Roman loves Camille as much as he loves his two daughters. But he is hiding from all of them a serious problem of addiction, which could endanger his dearest. Does love have a chance to survive when trust is broken?

recommendations.title: The Virgin Suicides
recommendations.overview: A group of male friends become obsessed with five mysterious sisters who are sheltered by their strict, religious parents.

recommendations.title: Just a Father
recommendations.overview: Carlo is a doctor that has recently lost his wife. Affected by the loss, he is supported by his family and friends, and, above all, for the love he feels towards his little daughter. And then, one day, he meets Camille.

recommendations.title: Paris, 13th District
recommendations.overview: Émilie meets Camille who is attracted to Nora, who crosses paths with Amber. Three girls and a boy – They're friends, sometimes lovers and often both.
